item.title: Flood the Servers
item.description: https://imgur.com/user/dtj0002/favorites/folder/12629015/flood-the-servers Somewhat tame picture with a link to a certain favorites folder of mine. Use the contents to flood them servers kiddos! Beat the bots and tell business daddy go away! Cheers
item.dc:creator: dtj0002

item.title: MRW someone ask what kind of fool would post 46 Intergalactic Quality posts in the last 24 hours and still think any of it is going to make a difference?

item.title: I don't know if two and a half thousand people is a lot on Bluesky, but it is for my degenerate self!
item.description: Apparently - and this might surprise you - people on the internet like wholesome, safe for work, family friendly, Sunday School cartoon horse content. And then there's the rest of you who follow me on Bluesky for the horse 'tang, stallion pretzel rods, and glazed ponuts. These are euphemisms. You may need to use your imagination. Or just, yaknow, come say hi: https://bsky.app/profile/elbowdeepinahorse.bsky.social
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.91 SINISTER KID
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Daniel Lieske
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Sinister Kid - Black Keys YouTube: https://youtu.be/r-8hNmuZ-80?si=Kda1DLPbF6g5zy_8 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/78krcD2vFUXJ3Y0XXeiHWH?si=933f76b76be94c2b
Sozomaika
Yeah, yeah - obviously AI.
Rostyslav Zagornov
Pavel Shut
Rui Guo
ur.ptato
Jiachang Zhan
Airborn Studios
Chloe Veillard
Konhis M
Ilya Kushinov
Ivan Shavrin
Wonbin Lee
Sang Delan
Alina Furhmann
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Re-uploading Imgur history in the Danquan Saga courtesy of stolen images from user TheDanquanSaga and AnthonyCapo. #teamtoaster
item.description: Thanks to @panta3 there's a small update and a link to the original https://imgur.com/gallery/XO685d2 Original post Only thing I could find was she named the baby Abigail He has a Twitter named AnthonytheCapo but it's approved followers only and fuck Twitter I don't have an account. Agreed. Fuck twitter. Fuck X. Fuck MediocreLabs. Fuck AI.
item.dc:creator: agentmcgee

item.title: #230 (recycled) memes
item.dc:creator: RECYCLEDMEMES

item.title: Memes vol 600
item.description:
You guys almost made me cry with your sweet words- I don’t think this will be my last ever meme dump. I have at least 2 more lined up (both themed) but I think there will be less posts from me. I can see myself definitely posting more themed dumps though
Bro how did the black dread even get off the ground
This line and the whole part with the prisoners singing a chorus line make this one of the best movies I’ve ever seen
My friend gave me a possum skull for my birthday
I saved this because it sounds like the way Jeff Vandermeer writes
This will not be the last you guys see of Mike Faist I swear it
Because of this meme I had a dream about templeton the rat
Froggy, Scruffy, and Nessie tax
Liza Jane tax
Scrump tax
Paulie and Bruce tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Thelma has the high ground! Wait, Louise has the high ground! Wait!!
item.description: My foster kittens are going around in circles on the cat tree. I can’t keep up with who is winning! Forgive me for doing this, but I’m gonna include this on all my posts for a while: Here’s my Bluesky account: https://bsky.app/profile/kittensfordays.bsky.social/post/3lxdobantcc2f And here’s my YouTube account: https://youtube.com/@therealkittensfordays I don’t want Imgur to die, but in case that happens, I want you guys to know where to go to keep up with my kittens. I am absolutely going to keep posting on Imgur, but I am also going to do my level best to be a prolific poster of videos on YouTube and pictures on Bluesky. You guys are just as invested in these kittens as I am. And I’ll be sure to post only new videos and pics on YouTube and Bluesky! Oh! AND! @TinyOctopus helped me create an email address so those of you who want to message me or keep in touch when/if Imgur goes down can always contact me! It’s kittensfordays@outlook.com. I don’t want to lose any of the relationships I’ve created here!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
